headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy on Boston Scientific, Lowers Price Target to $93
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst David Roman   maintains Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $98 to $93.
